expected_violation.rule: jti MUST NOT be reused; token rejected because jti is already present in the replay cache (PROTOCOL §2 idempotency / replay protection)

note: All structural fields conform to the schema, but jti 00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000000033 has already been seen by the verifier. The schema-level check passes, but business-layer replay cache rejects the token. policy_bundle_hash is structural; 结构示例，非密码学有效证据.
